solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_calculateToastDuration_type_signature and test_displayErrorToast_type_signature do pure text matching: they assert exact strings like 'message: string | null | undefined', 'if (!message)', 'return minDuration', 'error || i18n.t', and 'error: string | null | undefined' in source files. The function must actually implement the logic.
